Sections.Title: Professional Summary
Sections.Content: Motivated and detail-oriented Computer Science graduate with 1.5 years of experience in full-stack development. Proficient in Java, Python, and React.js with a strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, and system design. Passionate about building scalable, user-centric software solutions. Seeking a Software Engineer role to contribute to impactful products and grow in a collaborative engineering environment.

Sections.Title: Work Experience
Sections.Content: Junior Software Engineer at Infosys Limited, Bangalore (Jul 2023 – Dec 2024): Developed and maintained RESTful APIs using Spring Boot, reducing response time by 25%. Collaborated with cross-functional teams in 2-week Agile sprints. Wrote unit and integration tests using JUnit with 85% code coverage. Migrated legacy modules to microservices on AWS. | Software Engineering Intern at TechSpark Pvt. Ltd., Pune (Jan 2023 – Jun 2023): Built responsive UI components in React.js integrated with REST APIs. Designed MySQL database schemas for internal CRM tool. Contributed bug fixes reducing open issues by 30%.

Sections.Title: Education
Sections.Content: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering from Vellore Institute of Technology, Vellore, Tamil Nadu (Jul 2019 – May 2023). CGPA: 8.7. Honors: Merit Scholarship (2020, 2021).

Sections.Title: Technical Skills
Sections.Content: Languages: Java, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL. Frameworks & Libraries: Spring Boot, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Hibernate. Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB. Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Docker, Git, Jenkins, CI/CD Pipelines. Tools & Platforms: IntelliJ IDEA, VS Code, Postman, JIRA, Figma (basic).

Sections.Title: Certifications
Sections.Content: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner, Amazon Web Services, issued Mar 2024, expires Mar 2027, credential ID: AWS-CCP-2024-SA-00641. | Oracle Certified Associate Java SE 8 Programmer, Oracle Corporation, issued Aug 2023, credential ID: OCA-JAVA8-2023-SA-00819. | Meta Front-End Developer Professional Certificate, Meta via Coursera, issued Dec 2022, credential ID: META-FED-2022-SA-00334.
